key_insight: GMHF uses expert feedback to steer generated training data toward the unknown target distribution, improving generalization under distribution shift.
engineering_relevance: For materials discovery and other high-stakes engineering tasks, the method offers a practical way to leverage expert knowledge when target-domain data are scarce or unavailable.
method: Conditional Neural ODE acts as a generative digital twin to synthesize trajectories.
A reinforcement learning agent updates latent physical parameters using human feedback.
Theoretical bounds link better alignment with human beliefs to lower generalization risk.
evidence_signal: On a nonlinear Duffing oscillator, higher expert reliability reduced deployment loss and decreased divergence between generated and target data; additional tests on a probabilistic model showed the approach generalizes beyond ODE systems.
watch_item: Performance depends on the quality and consistency of human feedback, so unreliable experts could misguide the generator.
paper_title: Human-Machine Collaboration on Generative Meta-Learning: Model and Algorithm
